message:
🐛 Central fix: show skeleton instead of demo data flash during loading (#1136)

All cards that pass isDemoData to useCardLoadingState now show skeleton
during initial load instead of flashing demo content (yellow border +
Demo badge). Previously, each card had to manually exclude demo data
from hasAnyData — only NightlyE2EStatus did this.

Changes:
- CardDataContext.tsx: useCardLoadingState now treats demo data as
  "no data" during loading (hasRealData = hasAnyData && !isDemoData
  when isLoading). Once loading completes, demo fallback shows normally.
- NightlyE2EStatus.tsx: reverted per-card fix (now handled centrally)
- Compliance test: added 150ms delays to ALL mock API routes so every
  card's loading phase is observable by the 50ms monitor. Criterion (a)
  coverage improved from 26% to 45% of cards.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
